channel.title: linux on chtc
channel.description: Recent content in linux on chtc

item.title: tech
item.description: A list of technology stuff used by me. Here are the dotfiles. stuff I use computer Actually it’s a laptop not a cumputer. It’s a HP 250 G4 I think. programs and stuff OS: void linux WM: dwm Browser: firefox Terminal: st or foot when on wayland Editor: neovim Music Player: cmus Media Player: mpv Shell: mksh Image Viewer: imv PDF Viewer: zathura
